title: FakeForge
description: This mod allows you to reforge the appearance of any sword into other material styles. It only alters the visual display, remaining attributes unchanged.
body:
Want to prank friends with a "netherite sword" that's secretly wooden? This mod lets you completely retexture any sword to match other materials—without changing its stats.

_**How It Works**_

**1.Craft Qarium Core** – Dig deep! Qarium ore spawns between -32 and -48. Pop the ore into a Stonecutter to get Qarium Core.

**2.Make NeoForge Templates** – Combine Qarium Core with plank, stone, iron, netherite, other materials or even new additions like emerald and amethyst to create material-specific templates.

**3.Reforge in Smithing Table** – Use Fabric as your base template, add your sword, and slot in a NeoForge Template. Note that Fabric is crafted by any wool with a Stonecutter.
![Fake Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f0af1c5a57e66a9abe7b996b605404a02687954.png)

_**Perfect for Pranks**_

Turn a wooden sword into a netherite-cloaked trickster’s dream. Rename it with an Anvil (just try "Netherite Sword") and gift it to friends. Watch their faces when they swing it—total chaos, zero actual harm.

Or Imagine your friends' confusion when that "wooden sword" one-shots them in combat—how does a stick hit that hard?

**Completely No Balance Breaks, just pure cosmetic fun.**
